title: Timeline column arrows stop moving based on days in month for easier scrolling through months
excerpt: The arrows for scrolling through months when choosing the start and end date for timeline column move based on how many days are in the months shown, which is really annoying when you’re trying to quickly scroll through …

posts.author: el3 (Eloise Retallick)
posts.cookedHtml:
The arrows for scrolling through months when choosing the start and end date for timeline column move based on how many days are in the months shown, which is really annoying when you’re trying to quickly scroll through months to select your end date. Instead of the bottom of the frame growing down, the top grows up, taking the arrow buttons I’ve been clicking to a new spot.

Eg, two images of different size frames based on days in month:

image801×482 29.3 KB

Screenshot 2024-08-19 092211802×531 30.5 KB

posts.author: iDontLikeMondays (David)
posts.cookedHtml: Agree with this one, I was going to post a new request but found yours - not sure if GIFs work here but if not I can upload a video file to show the issue
